What We Do

Full-Service
China Sourcing

From your first product idea to repeat orders — we handle every step so you can focus on selling.

01

Product Sourcing

Tell us what you need. We search across 1688, Alibaba, and direct factory networks.

Get Started
  • Search across 1688, Alibaba & direct factories
  • 3–5 vetted suppliers with full price quotes
  • Factory certifications & track record verified
  • Complete supplier profile delivered in 48 hours
02

Quality Inspection

Physical inspection at the factory before your goods ship. Photo report and a clear pass/fail — every order.

Get Started
  • Pre-shipment inspection at factory or warehouse
  • 20–40 photo report covering all key aspects
  • Measurements, functionality tests & defect counts
  • Clear recommendation before you approve shipment
03

Purchasing & Payment

We negotiate in Chinese and handle all payments to verified suppliers.

Get Started
  • Price negotiation directly in Chinese
  • Secure payment only to verified suppliers
  • Full purchase order documentation provided
  • Multiple payment methods accepted from your side
04

Shipping & Logistics

Door-to-door worldwide. We compare freight options and handle customs docs.

Get Started
  • Air, sea & express options compared
  • Consolidated shipping from multiple suppliers
  • Commercial invoice & customs paperwork handled
  • Real-time tracking number shared with you
05

Factory Visits

For larger orders or new suppliers, we arrange in-person factory audits.

Get Started
  • Facility walkthrough & capacity verification
  • Worker safety & compliance check
  • On-site sample approval
  • Video call with you during the visit if needed
06

Ongoing Reorder Support

We build you a reliable reorder system so your business never runs out of stock.

Get Started
  • Dedicated supplier relationship management
  • Seasonal price renegotiation on your behalf
  • Reorder alerts & inventory planning support
  • Priority handling for repeat clients

Our Process

How a Typical Order
Flows

Day 1

You submit your request

Product details, quantity, quality requirements, and budget via our inquiry form.

Day 2

We send supplier options

3–5 vetted suppliers with quotes and profiles, ready for your review.

Day 3–5

Negotiation & purchase

We agree on terms in Chinese, issue the PO, and release the deposit securely.

Day 7–20

Production & inspection

Goods are manufactured. We inspect and send you a QC photo report before shipment.

Day 21+

Shipped & delivered

Goods leave China. You track in real time and receive at your door, customs cleared.

FAQ

Common
Questions

What is your minimum order size?

No strict minimum, but we work best with orders of $300 USD or more. Smaller orders may have fewer supplier options.

How long does the whole process take?

Supplier shortlist: 24–48h. Negotiation & purchase: 1–3 days. Inspection: 2–5 days after goods are ready. Shipping: 5–35 days.

What is your service fee?

A transparent fee based on order value — typically 5–10%. You always see the full cost breakdown before committing a dollar.

What if goods fail inspection?

We work with the supplier to resolve — rework, replacement, or refund. We never release payment without your approval.

Can I get custom packaging with my logo?

Yes. We handle custom boxes, bags, labels, and hang tags. MOQ varies by supplier, typically 300–1,000 pieces.

Do you support dropshipping?

Yes. We ship directly to your customers in multiple countries, with discrete or branded packaging.

Get Started

Ready to Place
Your First Order?

Send us your requirements and we'll have supplier options within 48 hours.
